description: CompositionGrey, white and purple striped round neck pullover made of an acrylic and polyester blend fabric, has a ribbed neckline and cuffs, and appliqué on the chestFittingRegularWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryWinter's back! Celebrate the winter chill in the warmth of this pullover from scullers. Put it over a round neck t-shirt or just a vest, pair it with jeans and sports shoes, and you're all set to enjoy that steaming hot street-food with the cold wind blowing over you.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in pulloversHeight: 6'; Shoulders:18"
